data.title: Disasters strike unexpectedly, preparation is key. Empower people with tools for resilience. #DisasterPreparedness.
data.description: On September 26, 2025, in New York, it was reported that unforeseen calamities such as hurricanes, wildfires, floods, and earthquakes can occur suddenly, emphasizing the importance of being prepared. Providing individuals and communities with resources for resilience is crucial.

data.title: 'GeForce NOW adds 'Mecha BREAK' and 9 games to library, boosts performance with NVIDIA DLSS 4 technology.'
data.description: GeForce NOW has expanded its cloud gaming offerings by introducing 'Mecha BREAK' and nine other games, along with the incorporation of NVIDIA DLSS 4 technology. This move aims to enhance performance for gamers utilizing the platform.
Fed's Barkin: Downside risks relatively limited for jobs and inflation.
Fed's Barkin: Inflation is moving in the wrong direction, but so is unemployment.

data.title: Global water and sewage construction projects valued at $583.5 billion with MENA leading at $236.7 billion, driven by desalination and recycling.
data.description: Dublin - A recent report titled "Project Insight - Global Water and Sewage Construction Projects (Q3 2025)" has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. The updated report is monitoring water and sewage construction projects globally, amounting to a total value of $583.5 billion. These projects encompass various stages ranging from early pre-planning like announcement and study to the execution phase. The analysis in the report is derived from the construction projects monitored by the analyst and presents the total project values.
BARKIN STATES THAT INCREASED PRODUCTIVITY AND CUSTOMER RESISTANCE ARE ASSISTING WITH INFLATION, WITH EXPECTATIONS FOR UNEMPLOYMENT RATE TO RISE SLIGHTLY LESS THAN BEFORE.
SEC AND FINRA LAUNCH PROBE INTO SUSPICIOUS TRADES AMID INSIDER TRADING ALLEGATIONS IN STOCKS OF COMPANIES ANNOUNCING CRYPTO TREASURY PLANS

data.title: Companies must grow, not just endure. Constant customer attraction and retention are crucial for success.
data.description: To ensure the success of your company, mere endurance is insufficient - growth is key. Without a consistent influx and retention of customers, all other efforts are insignificant. Smart businesses prioritize continuous growth to remain competitive in the market.

data.title: NextGen Digital Platforms Inc. bought 444 TAO tokens for $134,177, staked with RoundTable21 validator.
data.description: Vancouver, B.C. - NextGen Digital Platforms Inc. recently acquired 444 TAO tokens, the primary digital asset of the Bittensor network, for around USD$134,177, averaging USD$302 per token. The company promptly staked these tokens with RoundTable21, a top-tier validator in the Bittensor network. NextGen is recognized for bridging traditional capital markets with Web3 infrastructure.

data.title: United Community Banks, Inc. (NYSE: UCB) to release Q3 2025 financial results on Oct 22, 2025, before market opens. Conference call at 9:00 a.m. EST on same day.
data.description: In Greenville, South Carolina, on September 26, 2025, United Community Banks, Inc. (NYSE: UCB) revealed plans to disclose its third quarter 2025 financial report on October 22, 2025, before the market opens. Alongside this release, the company will host a conference call at 9:00 a.m. EST on the same day to delve into its financial performance, key business achievements, and future prospects.

data.title: Almadex Minerals Ltd. updates on Davis and Paradise Projects in Nevada, owns 358 claims totaling 2,800 hectares for exploration.
data.description: Almadex Minerals Ltd. (TSX-V: “DEX”) recently shared updates on exploration efforts at the Davis and Paradise Projects in Nevada. In 2019, the company expanded its presence in the area by acquiring the Davis property and staking the Paradise Valley property. The combined area now consists of 358 claims covering about 2,800 hectares, with various exploration targets. Situated around eight miles southeast of Gabbs, Nevada, and five miles northeast of the Paradise Peak gold mine, the projects show significant potential for mineral discoveries.

data.title: Camac Fund and DJA Partners nominate 5 directors to boost CreateAI Holdings shareholder value.
data.description: On September 26, 2025, in San Diego, Camac Fund, LP and DJA Partners, LP, collectively known as the Nominating Stockholders, disclosed their nomination of five competent, independent candidates for the Board of Directors of CreateAI Holdings Inc. No specific details on the candidates were provided.

data.title: Perpetua Resources reveals plans to secure US antimony supply chain, advancing Stibnite Gold Project. $PPTA.
data.description: In Boise, Idaho on September 26, 2025, Perpetua Resources Corp. (Nasdaq: PPTA) (TSX: PPTA) shared details about their initiatives to bolster the American antimony supply chain. The Stibnite Gold Project was a focal point of discussion.

data.title: Concord Medical's financial results for the first half of 2025 show optimistic growth in cancer services in China.
data.description: On September 26, 2025, an announcement was made by Concord Medical Services Holdings Limited, a leading healthcare provider in China focused on cancer treatment, research, education, and prevention. The company, listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol CCM, disclosed its unaudited consolidated financial report. This news is significant in the healthcare sector due to Concord Medical's specialized services and its impact in China, where it plays a crucial role in addressing cancer-related needs.

data.title: BTQ Technologies starts trading on Nasdaq stock exchange, ticker symbol BTQ, also listed on CBOE CA and FSE.
data.description: BTQ Technologies Corp., a leading global quantum technology company based in Vancouver, BC, declared on September 26, 2025, that its common shares (ticker symbol: BTQ) will now be available for trading on various stock exchanges including Nasdaq (BTQ), CBOE CA (BTQ), and FSE (NG3). The company specializes in enhancing the security of critical networks.

data.title: Aveanna Health (NASDAQ: AVAH) partakes in Deutsche Bank Leveraged Finance Conference on Oct 15, 2025 in Austin, TX.
data.description: A healthcare company, Aveanna Healthcare Holdings Inc. ("Aveanna") (NASDAQ: AVAH), is set to participate in the Deutsche Bank Annual Leveraged Finance Conference in Austin, TX on October 15, 2025. During the event, Aveanna's management team will be in attendance and will be conducting individual meetings with investors throughout the day. This conference presents an opportunity for Aveanna to engage with potential investors and showcase its business strategies.

data.title: Mediaplanet's "Future of Diabetes" campaign aims to address rising diabetes rates by focusing on patient stories and innovative care strategies.
data.description: On September 26, 2025, in New York, there is a notable increase in diabetes rates, emphasizing the need for immediate action. To address this issue, Mediaplanet is launching the "Future of Diabetes" campaign. This initiative aims to provide patients and healthcare providers with the most advanced approaches for prevention, treatment, and ongoing care. The campaign will focus on tackling the escalating diabetes crisis and providing essential information to combat this health challenge.
